    A

    AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider - Class in com.shaft.gui.internal.video
    Desktop video provider backed by Automation Remarks and JAVE.
    AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider() - Constructor for class com.shaft.gui.internal.video.AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider
     

    C

    com.shaft.gui.internal.video - package com.shaft.gui.internal.video
     

    I

    isRecording() - Method in class com.shaft.gui.internal.video.AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider
    Reports whether a desktop recording is active for the current test thread.

    S

    startRecording() - Method in class com.shaft.gui.internal.video.AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider
    Starts a Monte desktop recording for the current test thread.
    stopRecording(boolean, String) - Method in class com.shaft.gui.internal.video.AutomationRemarksDesktopVideoRecordingProvider
    Stops, processes, and MP4-encodes the current thread's desktop recording.
